---
doc_type: working
status: active
owner: replace-me
created: YYYY-MM-DD
expires: YYYY-MM-DD # no more than 30 days after created
why_new: Explain why the work cannot live in an existing working note or task.
promotes_to: null
supersedes: []
---

# Working note title

## Question or outcome

State the question being answered or the concrete outcome being pursued.

## Evidence

Keep point-in-time findings here. Do not present them as durable current state.

## Exit

Before `expires`, choose exactly one:

- promote the durable result into canon, a contract, or a runbook;
- record a consequential choice as a decision;
- archive the investigation as historical evidence; or
- delete it because code or a task now carries the truth.
